summary.intent: Add a boolean config flag `show_settings_hint` to allow users to hide the repetitive 'CONFIGURE' section from compaction notifications across all surfaces (web UI card and channel notices).
summary.outcome: Implemented `show_settings_hint` in `CompactionConfig`, threaded it through `broadcast_metadata` and `notify_channels_of_compaction`, updated config schema/validation/template and docs, and shipped 2 new tests covering the opt-out case. All 226 chat + 185 config tests pass; committed and pushed to PR #653.

repo: Compaction config lives in `crates/config/src/schema.rs` and must be registered in `build_schema_map` in `validate.rs` and the template in `template.rs` — three files must be updated in sync for any new config key.

The `broadcast_metadata` function in `crates/chat/src/compaction_run/mod.rs` handles web UI card rendering; `notify_channels_of_compaction` and `format_channel_compaction_notice` in `crates/chat/src/lib.rs` handle channel notices — both must be updated when changing notification content.

A `compaction_mode_key_matches_toml_serialization` test pins Rust→JSON key strings to prevent silent drift with the JS `COMPACTION_MODE_LABELS` map — any new mode must update both Rust and JS plus this test.
Channel notices use `send_text_silent` so they don't trigger TTS, don't count as interactive replies, and preserve reply targets for the agent's actual response.
The project uses `cargo +nightly-2025-11-30` for fmt/clippy with `-D warnings` enforced; biome is used for JS formatting.

code.finding: CompactionConfig struct — add new boolean fields here first, then propagate to validate.rs and template.rs
build_schema_map must be updated for every new config key added to schema.rs
broadcast_metadata controls web UI card content; takes include_settings_hint parameter after this change
format_channel_compaction_notice and notify_channels_of_compaction control channel notice content; both updated to accept and honour show_settings_hint flag

workflow: The validation sequence is: fmt --check → clippy (with default features) → clippy (--no-default-features) → cargo test --lib for each crate → biome check for JS.

Tests needed updating in two separate files (compaction_run/mod.rs and lib.rs) when a parameter is added to internal functions — existing tests become compile errors and must be updated alongside new opt-out tests.

friction: Required editing multiple files (schema, validate, template, two chat files, docs) for a single boolean flag — the config system has no single-point registration.

At least one fmt/test iteration was needed after the initial implementation (the transcript shows a fixup edit to lib.rs and compaction_run/mod.rs after the first green check), suggesting a small formatting or lint issue slipped through.
open_items: The settings hint text currently exists in three places (Rust backend constant, JS COMPACTION_MODE_LABELS, Rust channel format function) — adding a fifth compaction mode will require touching all three sites plus the pin test; no deduplication was done.

The `show_settings_hint` flag only suppresses the hint in notifications; no mention of whether the web UI settings panel itself surfaces this toggle or whether it appears in any onboarding/first-run flow.
